prompt:
An ISS spotting station prepared at dusk: a leveled tripod holding a small telescope or long-lens camera, with a dim red clip-on light attached near the head and a small gear pouch hanging from the center column for stability. The scene includes a cleared footpath leading to an open patch of sky, with a subtle horizon line and faint stars beginning to appear, emphasizing practical outdoor setup for tracking a predicted pass.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk outdoor aesthetic: soft twilight lighting, realistic textures, no logos, no readable screens, and no large text. If a person is implied, show only partial hands adjusting a knob—no identifiable faces—and keep the composition clean and icon-friendly.
